+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-container-tools-11541-os-x-podman-machine-time-stops-sometime",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-container-tools: OS X, podman machine time stops sometime",
+    "description": "OS X, podman machine time stops sometime. This issue affects 33+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:\n```bash\npodman --version\npodman info --format json | jq .version\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-container-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:\n**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**\r\n\n**Description**\nDate output is wrong for both containers and podman machine itself on OS X.\n\nI'm not sure 100% in my reproduction guide \n1. Install podman on OSX\n2."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for OS X, podman machine time stops sometime",
+        "description": "I think KVM does this (~ntp~) in \"hardware\", but it seems to be missing from HVF ?\n\nMight have to run an ntpd in the VM, before it is supported by the virtualization\n\nEDIT: I think I got RTC and NTP confused in my head there.\n\n```\n[    0.249404] PM: RTC time: 17:44:05, date: 2021-09-13\n[   \n```yaml\n$ date\nSun Sep 12 15:55:30 MSK 202\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm OS X, podman machine time stops sometime is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I think KVM does this (~ntp~) in \"hardware\", but it seems to be missing from HVF ?\n\nMight have to run an ntpd in the VM, before it is supported by the virtualization\n\nEDIT: I think I got RTC and NTP confused in my head there.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ date\nSun Sep 12 15:55:30 MSK 202",
+        "$ date\nFri Sep 10 19:47:08 UTC 2021",
+        "Client:\nVersion:      3.3.1\nAPI Version:  3.3.1\nGo Version:   go1.17\nBuilt:        Mon Aug 30 22:15:26 2021\nOS/Arch:      darwin/amd64\n\nServer:\nVersion:      3.3.1\nAPI Version:  3.3.1\nGo Version:   go1.16.6\nBuilt:        Mon Aug 30 23:46:36 2021\nOS/Arch:      linux/amd64"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
